name: Linear
description: Let agents triage issues, inspect project state, and prepare Linear updates through an MCP or helper command.

access.label: Linear connector
access.detail: Requires a Linear MCP, OAuth connector, or API token configured where the agent runs. BuildingHub only records the setup path.

tools.name: linear
tools.detail: Preferred MCP path for issue and project access.

tools.name: LINEAR_API_KEY
tools.detail: Fallback API key for local helper commands.

endpoints.name: Linear MCP
endpoints.detail: MCP surface configured outside BuildingHub for issue and project access.

capabilities.name: linear
capabilities.detail: Preferred path for issue and project access.

steps.title: Connect Linear
steps.detail: Authorize the MCP or provide an API key to the agent environment.

steps.title: Set team boundaries
steps.detail: Document which Linear teams, projects, and update actions are allowed.

steps.title: Install the building
steps.detail: Add Linear to Agent Town once access has been reviewed.
